description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in dark, weathered shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic and natural appearance. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a modest overhang on all sides. There are no visible windows or doors on any side, resulting in a simple, utilitarian structure. The cabin's proportions are low and elongated, suggesting a single-story layout. The overall look is functional and unadorned, suitable for rural or park settings.
description: A rustic, rectangular wooden cabin with a dark gable roof and no visible windows or doors. The structure is simple, with weathered wood planks and a low, elongated profile.
description_view_0: The gable end of the cabin is visible, showing the triangular roof peak and horizontal wood siding with no openings.
description_view_1: A long side view of the cabin reveals the full length of the roof and walls, with a central gap at the base but no windows or doors.
description_view_2: The opposite gable end mirrors view 0, with the same triangular roof and wood siding, also lacking any openings.
description_view_3: The other long side of the cabin is shown, similar to view 1 but without the central gap at the base.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in dark asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: No windows are visible on any side of the cabin
attribute_door_placement: No exterior doors are visible on any side of the cabin
